settings.editor:
2008年，第一家店!

“很長一段時間以來，我想要一個地方，我可以展示一些優雅的禮品，以及每人能得到一件有氣質的禮品。我喜歡非常簡單、略顯高貴和實用的東西混合。”

卓越獎品有限公司在香港商業區改裝了一家懷舊店，變身成為了它的第一家店。這家第一間禮品店既是辦公室又是工作室，也是表達和聯繫的地方。之後的情況就這樣發生......客戶來自四方八面，香港、中國、日本、美國、英國，以及世界其他主要市場的客戶，大家互相展開一次又一次的對話和溝通， 建立多年持久的信任關係。這是承諾! 這就是我們對客戶的承諾 : 「高質量、實惠價格」。

2008年，第一家店!

“For a long time, I envisioned a place where I could showcase elegant gifts — somewhere every person could find something with real quality and character. I love the combination of simplicity, a touch of refinement, and genuine practicality.”

Crystal Century Ltd renovated a heritage shopfront in Hong Kong's business district, and it became our very first store — part office, part workshop, and a place for creative expression and connection. From there, things grew organically. Clients arrived from across Hong Kong, Mainland China, Japan, the USA, the UK, and other major markets around the world. Conversation by conversation, order by order, we built lasting relationships founded on trust. That is our promise — and it always has been: "High quality, affordable pricing."
自2008年創立以來，卓越獎品有限公司已為數百家企業、學校及機構提供優質獎盃及禮品訂製服務，客戶遍及香港、中國、日本、美國及英國。以下為部分精選客戶案例，展示我們的工藝水平與服務範疇。

活動類型：企業頒獎典禮
訂製產品：水晶獎座、銀碟
渣打銀行為其年度卓越表現頒獎典禮訂製一系列精美水晶獎座及銀碟紀念品，彰顯對傑出員工及業績優秀團隊的表彰與嘉許。每件獎座均刻有渣打標誌及個人化獎項名稱，品質精良，典禮場面隆重。

活動類型：選美活動
訂製產品：訂製獎盃、王冠配件
為Miss Asia香港區選美比賽提供精緻訂製獎盃及相關頒獎禮品，每件均根據主辦機構的品牌形象度身訂製，充分展現典禮的高貴氣派與品牌形象。

活動類型：訂製獎盃及禮品
訂製產品：多款獎盃、獎牌、木盾
卓越獎品長期服務來自不同行業的企業客戶，提供各類頒獎典禮獎品、周年紀念禮品及企業推廣禮品。以下為部分實際訂單案例，展示我們的工藝水平與服務能力。

活動類型：運動比賽頒獎
訂製產品：獎牌、獎盃
我們為多個香港及亞太地區體育賽事提供批量訂製獎牌及獎盃。憑藉快捷的生產周期及嚴格的品質管控，確保每次活動均能如期收到符合要求的頒獎禮品。
無論是大型企業頒獎典禮、學校運動會，還是個人紀念禮品，我們都能為您提供專業的一站式訂製服務。歡迎聯絡我們的專業團隊，為您的活動度身打造最完美的獎品方案。
自2008年創立以來，卓越獎品有限公司已為數百家企業、學校及機構提供優質獎盃及禮品訂製服務，客戶遍及香港、中國、日本、美國及英國。以下為部分精選Case Studies，展示我們的工藝水平與服務範疇。

Event type: Corporate Award Ceremony
Products: Crystal Trophies, Commemorative Plates

Standard Chartered Bank commissioned a series of custom crystal trophies and commemorative plates for their annual excellence awards ceremony, honouring outstanding employees and high-performing teams. Each trophy was laser-engraved with the Standard Chartered logo and individual award title, crafted to the highest quality for a prestigious occasion.

Event type: Pageant Event
Products: Custom Trophies & Crown Accessories

Crystal Century supplied custom trophies and award gifts for the Miss Asia Hong Kong pageant. Each piece was individually crafted to reflect the event's brand identity, conveying the elegance and prestige befitting such a celebrated occasion.

Event type: Custom Trophies & Gifts
Products: Trophies, Medals, Plaques

Crystal Century regularly serves corporate clients across a wide range of industries, supplying award ceremony trophies, anniversary commemorative gifts and corporate promotional merchandise. The above represents a cross-section of actual projects, demonstrating our production capabilities and quality standards.

Event type: Sports Event Awards
Products: Medals, Trophies

We have supplied bulk custom medals and trophies for multiple sports events across Hong Kong and the Asia-Pacific region. Our efficient production cycle and strict quality control ensure every event receives award-ready pieces on schedule.
